chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Appeal No.S- 168 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For further orders. 12.12.2025. None present. It appears from the Accountant Report dated 27.11.2025 that the order of this Court passed on the last date of hearing has been complied with and there is nothing left in the matter. Accordingly, the matter may be consigned to record. JUDGE Tufail
